hero_title: Your best choice in moving and logistics
hero_subtitle: Residential and commercial moves, transport of sensitive equipment and storage with quality and safety.
value_proposition: Your best choice for residential, commercial moving and specialized transport.

company.title: COMPANY
company.text: FDS works in the field of specialized transport for commercial and residential moves, transport of sensitive goods and works of art, storage and logistics.

services.title: SERVICES
services.text: Commercial and residential moves, transport of sensitive goods and works of art, furniture disassembly and assembly, internal relocations, storage, logistics and distribution.

contact.title: CONTACT
contact.text: If you have any questions or would like to request more information about our services, please contact us.

seo.title: FDS Logistics and Outsourcing - Residential and Commercial Moving
seo.description: FDS Logistics: specialist in residential and commercial moves, transport of sensitive equipment, storage and labor outsourcing. Serving throughout the national territory.
seo.og_description: Specialist in residential and commercial moves with quality and safety

company.title: The Company
company.p1: Starting its operations in 2005, FDS Logística was born with residential and commercial moves as its main activities. A company that aims for TOTAL QUALITY, with great dedication in service, information, and negotiations.
company.p2: FDS Logística is a company specialized in providing logistics services and labor outsourcing, with its main activities being the administration and operation of storage, transport management, and/or distribution of any type of goods or products, outsourcing of specialized labor in the areas of conservation and cleaning, concierge, gardening, among others that can assist in the operation of our clients.
company.p3: Services are dimensioned and adapted to the needs of our clients, considering costs, deadlines, resources, quality, and strategic issues. The company operates throughout the national territory.
company.p4: For this, it has the knowledge and experience necessary for the execution and implementation of integrated logistics projects. It brings together people with experience to provide the best service to our clients.
company.p5: FDS Logística seeks to interpret the needs and wishes of its clients, providing the most appropriate form of service to their requirements. With the partnership of FDS professionals, our clients will have access to what is most modern, efficient, and economical when they need the services of a carrier for residential or commercial moves.

commercial.title: Commercial Moving:
commercial.text: All corporate moving processes are managed in all their phases by specialized coordinators. Coding and identification processes for layouts and packaging for transport are fully inventoried and monitored. In this way, we guarantee a smooth transition without disruption to the areas and departments on the move.

residential.title: Residential Moving:
residential.text: We perform local, intercity, and interstate door-to-door moves throughout the national territory. We use the best disposable materials to pack your belongings (triplex cardboard boxes, silk papers, Kraft paper, corrugated cardboard for furniture packaging, and special blankets for cardboard clothes among others). We disassemble and assemble all types of furniture. We inventory all items of the move, giving more safety to our clients.

sensitive.title: Sensitive Transport:
sensitive.text: We use qualified and trained professionals for handling sensitive equipment, packing, removing, and transporting within the regulations of our clients, ensuring the quality of the equipment.

art.title: Artwork Transport:
art.text: We perform special packaging services following the standards required by our clients and use technical reports to ensure the quality of our packaging. Transports are carried out in climate-controlled vehicles equipped with air suspension.

assembly.title: Furniture Disassembly and Assembly:
assembly.text: Trained and specialized labor that follows manufacturers' recommendations.

internal.title: Internal Relocations:
internal.text: Specialized team in layout implementation coordinated by specialized professionals, meeting the requirements and expectations of architects and managers involved in the process, speeding up with safety, punctuality, and organization in the implementation.

storage.title: Storage:
storage.text: We offer a new storage philosophy, aggregated to the physical or structural changes of a company. We make a comparative analysis of existing furniture, storing its surplus in our warehouses, with total classification and online control by the client. We have a WMS system (Warehouse Management System), for the management of any and all items to be stored, issuing management reports easily accessible to the client.

logistics.title: Logistics and Distribution:
logistics.text: We make available small, medium, and large vehicle fleets equipped with satellite trackers, risk managers, and insurance policies ACF (Art. Seguro), in large centers and support points for application and preservation operation.

outsourcing.title: Labor Outsourcing:
outsourcing.text: We are a company specialized in providing labor in several segments, such as cleaning, concierge, gardening, pantry, reception, among others. Our employees are specialized, being frequently trained to better serve our clients. One of the main advantages in labor outsourcing is that our clients can focus their efforts on the core activities of the company, leaving to us all the labor needed for support.
